milestone_focus_summary: Demonstrate governance-compliant future work proposal publication without adding another ad hoc issue seeding path.
why_it_matters: Future roadmap work should pass through one governance-aware publication path so labels, budget posture, and execution metadata stay disciplined.
acceptance_criteria: Freeze the proposal surface without creating another generator or template family outside the declared governance paths.
Render an issue body that follows the M317 issue-body contract and the M318 planning-hygiene policy.
Make publication metadata explicit enough that labels, milestone targeting, and blockers can be carried forward without hand editing.
design_corrections_folded_in: Uses one governed proposal path instead of issue-local markdown fragments and manual label editing.
notes: This sample fixture is render-only and is used solely to validate the tool chain.

execution_order.instruction: Example execution ordering only; replace with real sequencing when used for publication.
